heroTitle: Phones, PCs, tablets, and accessories delivered with cash on delivery to all 58 wilayas.
heroDescription: A multilingual storefront built for Algerian customers with clear checkout, AI confirmation, and reliable order tracking.
featuredDescription: Best-selling products selected from the live backend catalog.
categoryDescription: Explore phones, computers, tablets, and accessories with live stock and pricing.
filtersSearchPlaceholder: Search by product name or brand
filtersMobileHint: Use filters to narrow the catalog quickly.
noProductsDescription: Try another category, brand, or price range.
homeLoadErrorDescription: Please check your connection and try again.
homeAffiliatePromoDescription: Join our affiliate program, share your referral link, and earn a commission on every delivered order placed through it.
earnMoneyTitle: Turn your audience into income with VisaStore
earnMoneyDescription: Share your personal referral link with friends and followers. Every time someone buys through your link, you earn a commission - no investment, no stock, no risk.
earnMoneyStep1Description: Register in seconds and get your unique referral link and promo codes from your dashboard.
earnMoneyStep2Description: Post your link on social media, groups, or send it directly to friends and family.
earnMoneyStep3Description: Earn a commission on every delivered order placed through your link, then request a withdrawal anytime.
earnMoneyCtaDescription: Join hundreds of affiliates already earning with VisaStore. It only takes a minute to get started.
adminPromoCodeFieldToggle: Show promo code field at checkout
productFastDecision: Clear specs, COD, and delivery across Algeria.
productViewingNow: people are viewing this right now
productAiDescription: The assistant answers only with real product data. If data is missing, it says so clearly.
productSupportNote: Need more details? Our team can confirm stock and delivery before dispatch.
wishlistDescription: Products you've saved for later — tap the heart icon on any product to add or remove it here.
wishlistEmptyDescription: Tap the heart icon on a product card or product page to save it here for later.
cartDescription: Review your items before continuing to checkout.
checkoutDescription: A simple Algerian checkout flow with customer details, delivery choice, AI confirmation, and final success.
checkoutSecureNote: Cash on delivery only. Shipping fee is calculated from the selected wilaya.
checkoutValidationPhone: Enter a valid Algerian phone number.
checkoutValidationPromoPhone: Enter your phone number before validating the promo code.
checkoutWilayaLoadError: Unable to load delivery regions. Please refresh the page.
checkoutShippingFeeError: Unable to calculate the shipping fee right now. It will be confirmed before delivery.
aiConfirmationDescription: The assistant confirms the order details before the admin team starts processing.
aiHint: Reply with confirmation or ask to change delivery details before the order is approved.
orderSuccessDescription: Your order was received and reviewed. Our team will call you shortly to confirm the details before it ships.
trackDescription: Use your order number after AI confirmation to see the latest status.
trackEmptyDescription: Enter your order number to display the latest status.
trackPhoneEmptyDescription: No orders were found for this phone number.
contactDescription: Customer support, delivery clarification, and order help are available by phone, WhatsApp, and email.
authAdminDescription: Manage catalog, shipping, orders, promo codes, affiliates, and commissions.
authAffiliateDescription: Track referral performance, promo codes, commissions, and withdrawals.
authValidationPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.
authValidationPhone: Enter a valid Algerian phone number.
authRegisterPending: Your affiliate request was sent. Wait for admin approval before login.
authPendingApproval: Your account is pending admin approval.
adminOrdersDescription: Review customer details, change statuses, and watch delivery activity by wilaya.
adminEditingProductHint: You are editing an existing product.
adminSlugHint: Leave empty to generate automatically from the English name.
adminNotePlaceholder: Important note for buyers (e.g. minor screen scratches) - shown clearly on the product page
adminVariantsHint: Add one row per option (e.g. storage 256GB and 128GB) to publish them all at once.
adminAffiliateProgramLabel: Include this product in the affiliate program
affiliateOverviewDescription: Commissions are approved only after an order is delivered or picked up.
affiliateWithdrawalDescription: Submit payout details for approved balance only.
affiliateCommissionRule: Commission is counted only after delivered or picked up orders.
affiliateCancelledRule: Cancelled, returned, and failed orders do not count.
affiliateAccountInfoCardlessHint: Enter your national ID number and withdrawal PIN
footerDescription: Production-ready Algerian tech commerce with COD, multilingual storefront, affiliate sales, and AI order confirmation.
footerBadge: 58 wilayas · cash on delivery · AI confirmation
